name: CFilm
description: C-film custom features for Jellyfin: an ordered Recommendations row and VOD (streaming service) identification via TMDB watch providers (JP / flatrate).

versions.changelog: Fix iOS detection on the one-tap connect fallback page: iPadOS Safari (and iPhone Safari with "Request Desktop Website" enabled) reports a Macintosh user agent by default, which was falling through to the Android store link. Now also treated as iOS when the UA claims Mac but the device supports multi-touch.

The Connect page's "Install from Store" link now points to the real C-film App Store / Google Play listings (auto-detected by device OS), replacing placeholder URLs. Both can optionally be overridden per-server in plugin settings.

Added GET /Plugins/CFilm/ConnectInfo, an anonymous JSON endpoint that returns this server's configured Jellyseerr URL. The C-film app now calls it after any successful server connection (manual URL entry or tapping a saved server), not just via the one-tap deep link, so Jellyseerr auto sign-in works the same way regardless of how the user connected. Works for any Jellyfin server running the CFilm plugin, not just this one.

Connect endpoint now also passes an optional Jellyseerr URL (configurable in plugin settings), so the app can automatically sign in to Jellyseerr using the same Jellyfin credentials right after login.
Connect endpoint now also accepts the X-Forwarded-Protocol header (in addition to X-Forwarded-Proto) when detecting the reverse-proxied URL.
Add one-tap connect endpoint (GET /Plugins/CFilm/Connect) for the C-film app.
VOD scan now requires selecting libraries first; results include libraryId per item.
Initial release: Recommendations row + VOD provider identification.
